rows.label: qev025305_MSG0001
rows.name:
What's that, you're looking for an NLA
specialty product? In that case... look
no further than our prized item![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025305_MSG0002
rows.name:
How about our Special Hamburger?
I'll let you have it for 700G.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025305_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline, saying you don't need it.

rows.label: qev025305_MSG0003
rows.name:
Here you go, take it! I'm sure
even a Ma-non will be more
than satisfied with this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025305_MSG0004
rows.name:
Is that so? Well, let me know
if you change your mind![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025305_MSG0005
rows.name: ...Huh? You don't even have 700G on you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025305_MSG0006
rows.name:
You better work a little harder at
your BLADE jobs and earn some cash![ST:wait ]
